applicability_notes: In-place strided slice assignment into a pre-allocated destination tensor (e.g. KV-cache fill). Replaces torch advanced-index assignment dst[b0:e0, b1:e1, b2:e2, b3:e3] = src. Source tensor is consumed (often deallocated immediately after) while destination persists across iterations.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: slice-sized region [bsz, nh, seq_len, head_dim], smaller than destination
placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn_input = ttnn.to_memory_config(ttnn_input, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) before slice_write

placement_observations.size_descriptor: full tensor, superset of written slice region
placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn_output = ttnn.to_memory_config(ttnn_output, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before slice_write

placement_observations.tensor_role: input (source K/V states, typecast to bfloat8_b)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: [bsz, nh, seq_len, head_dim] per-step K/V states
placement_observations.source: model call_site: k_bf8 = ttnn.typecast(key_states, dtype=ttnn.bfloat8_b, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) immediately before slice_write into k_cache

placement_observations.size_descriptor: full KV cache [bsz, nh, max_seq_len, head_dim], persistent across forwards
placement_observations.source: model call_site: slice_write(k_bf8, k_cache, ...) / slice_write(v_bf8, v_cache, ...) into persistent cache; source explicitly placed in DRAM and cache outlives deallocated source
